name: Antipasti Alla Noemi
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Medium shrimp, cooked and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Have your fish dealer prepare the squid by removing the skin, long bone on the inside, yellow deposit, and ink sac. Wash the squid well, dry thoroughly, and cut crosswise into 1/4-inch slices resembling rings. Poach in white wine until tender, then drain and cool to room temperature.
2. Thoroughly wash and scrub the mussels, removing grit and sand. Place them in a large pot with 1/2 cup boiling water and steam over medium heat for 5 minutes or until the shells open. Cooked and served the same day you buy them.
3. Arrange an assortment of seafood attractively on 8 plates. Garnish with lemon wedges.
4. Whisk together olive oil and lemon juice, and drizzle over the seafood.
5. Using a whisk, combine mayonnaise, catsup, brandy, and Worcestershire sauce. Serve dollops of this sauce on each plate.
